changelog:
Allow max account attempts to be set to 0 for continuous, context-aware account polling. Unlimited mode resets exclusions between rounds, applies bounded backoff, honors shutdown and client cancellation, and removes the total upstream-attempt cap.
账号最大尝试数现在可设为 0，以持续轮询可用账号。无限模式会按轮重置排除列表、执行有上限的退避等待、响应客户端取消与服务关闭，并取消上游总尝试次数限制。
